goals: 🛑 MEDICAL URGENCY: Fasting Sugar ~300 is High Risk
Strict Sugar Control: Target < 150 mg/dL (Urgent Medication Required)
Weight Loss: Target -4 to -5 kg in 1 month (Current: 95kg)
Zero Sugar, Zero Refined Carbs, Zero Fruit Juice
Max 3 tsp (15ml) Oil per day total across all meals

schedule.label: Wake-up (Cooling Start)
schedule.food: Methi Dana Water (soaked overnight) OR Jeera Pani. (Helps keep body cool and controls morning sugar spike)

schedule.label: Breakfast (Light & Protein)
schedule.food: 2 Moong Dal Chillas (made with 1 tsp oil max) + 1 small glass fresh Chaach (Buttermilk with roasted jeera). (Replace Dahi with Chaach for better summer digestion)

schedule.label: Mid-Morning Snack
schedule.food: Kheera (Cucumber) slices OR ½ Apple / 1 small Guava. + 1 glass Chaach (Buttermilk with jeera, no sugar).

schedule.label: Lunch (Strict Portioning)
schedule.food: 1–2 Multigrain Rotis + 1 katori Dal / Paneer / Sabzi + Kachumber Salad + 1 bowl Chaach. (Chaach is preferred over Dahi in summer for diabetes)

schedule.label: Evening Snack
schedule.food: Roasted Chana OR Sprouted Moong. + 1 cup Green Tea (No sugar). (Can also take 5-6 soaked almonds here)

schedule.label: Dinner (Light)
schedule.food: 1–2 Multigrain Rotis + Light Sabzi (Lauki/Tori) OR Vegetable Clear Soup. (Keep dinner very light)

recipes.title: 🌾 1 Week Multigrain Atta Mix (2kg)
recipes.details: Mix together and store in an airtight container:
ingredients: 300g Bajra (Pearl Millet) - Limit in peak summer

recipes.title: 🥞 Moong Dal Chilla (For 2 pcs)
recipes.details: Soak 100g moong dal for 6-8 hours. Grind into batter.
ingredients: Cooking: Use max ½ tsp oil per chilla (1 tsp total for 2)

recipes.title: 🛢️ Daily Oil Rule (Max 15ml / 3 tsp)
recipes.details: Rotate between healthy oils. Avoid refined oil & vanaspati.

drinks.name: Chaach (Buttermilk)
drinks.note: Ayurvedic nectar for summer, light & cooling

lifestyle.title: Walk After Every Meal
lifestyle.note: 10–15 min walk after breakfast, lunch, and dinner is mandatory. Total steps: 7000–9000/day.

lifestyle.title: Doctor Consultation
lifestyle.note: Fasting 300 is high risk. Along with this strict diet, medication/insulin adjustment from a doctor is urgent.

lifestyle.title: Weekly Check
lifestyle.note: Monitor fasting sugar every morning. Log weight weekly. Target: 150 mg/dL sugar, -4kg weight.
